ReviewsWidget.title: What do buyers think about their plans 2 months after purchase?

home.title: Workout Plan | Musclepals
home.description: Create a workout plan tailored to you. Short quiz, result in a few minutes.

workout.title: Professional Workout Plan - personalized for you
workout.description: Looking for an effective exercise plan? I will prepare a set based on your answers.

workoutForm.title: Plan Form | Musclepals
workoutForm.description: Answer the questions to adapt the plan to your goals.

WorkoutPage.description: Complete a short quiz and I will create the perfect workout plan for you! It will take you 2-3 minutes.

bulk.label: I want to gain
bulk.alt: I want to gain muscle mass
bulk.description: You focus on building new muscle mass, weight increases.

cut.label: I want to reduce
cut.description: You lose weight, fat disappears and you emphasize already existing muscles.

Bodyfat.title:
Select your
body fat level
Bodyfat.alt: Physique for the selected body fat level

stepsDataMale.info: This is an extremely low body fat level. The physique is very muscular and muscle definition is excellent.
This is a very low body fat level. The physique is lean, muscles are clearly visible.
This is a healthy, athletic body fat level. Muscles are visible, but the physique is not emaciated.
This is a low body fat level. The physique is lean, muscles are visible.
This is a moderate body fat level. The physique is fuller, muscles are less visible.
This is a higher body fat level. The physique is rounded, muscles are invisible.
This is a high body fat level. The physique is very rounded.
This is a very high body fat level. The physique is obese.

stepsDataFemale.info: Very low body fat content, typical for figure sports competitors. May be associated with hormonal disorders and lack of menstruation.
Low body fat content, often found in active women and athletes. Very lean physique with clearly outlined muscles.
Healthy, athletic body fat level. Lean but feminine physique. Most commonly found in active women.
Average body fat level. Natural physique, slightly rounded, without clear muscle definition.
Elevated body fat level. Clearly rounded physique, possible health problems related to excess fat.
Very high body fat level. Health consultations and lifestyle changes are recommended.

Weight.title2: How much would you like to weigh?
Weight.error2: Please provide your target weight in the range of 30-300kg.
Weight.errorBulk: If your goal is mass, the weight target must be greater than current weight.
Weight.errorCut: If your goal is reduction, the weight target must be less than current weight.

12-14.description: This is the best time to build solid foundations! Now your body is just developing, so the key is habits and learning technique, not huge weights.

15-20.message: Ideal age to seriously get into training!
15-20.description: The body regenerates quickly, so you can make great progress with well-planned exercises and nutrition.

21-30.message: This is the time when you can build a truly great form!
21-30.description: You already have body awareness - now you just need a well-chosen plan to take your results to a new level.

Activity.title: What is your level of physical activity?
Activity.errorMsg: Please select one of the options before proceeding.

options.low_activity: I sit most of the day, little movement. 🛋️
options.some_activity: I move a bit, but without regular workouts. 🚶
options.light_training: I train lightly a few times a week. 🏃‍♂️
options.regular_training: I exercise regularly, I am active most days. 💪
options.hard_work: I train a lot or have hard physical work. 🏋️‍♂️

description.starvation: The body is severely weakened due to a very large body mass deficit.
description.emaciation: The body is clearly weakened, muscles and tissues do not have sufficient nutrition.
description.underweight: Body mass is too low. The body is not properly protected against diseases and tolerates physical effort worse.
description.normal: The body is neither overloaded with excessive body fat nor weakened by its deficiency.
description.overweight: Excess body fat appears, which begins to burden the body.
description.obesityI: Excess body fat clearly overloads the body and increases the risk of diseases.
description.obesityII: The body is heavily overloaded. The risk of serious chronic diseases and limited physical fitness increases.
description.obesityIII: A very large amount of body fat seriously threatens health and life.

gym.label: I will train at the gym
gym.label_f: I will train at the gym
gym.alt: I will train at the gym
gym.alt_f: I will train at the gym
gym.description: Training at the gym with access to a wide selection of equipment.
gym.description_f: Training at the gym with access to a wide selection of equipment.

home.label: I will train at home
home.description: Training at home with the possibility of adapting to available equipment.
home.description_f: Training at home with the possibility of adapting to available equipment.

bandsPanel.question: Do you have access to resistance bands?

Experience.title:
What is your experience
in training?

none.label: I haven't started training yet. 🐣
none.description1: At the beginning, it is crucial to learn correct technique and build consistency.
none.description2:
But no worries!
Your Plan will guide you through this step by step ;)

just_started.label: I just started. 🏁
just_started.description2: At this stage, the body responds quickly to training, so we will focus on learning technique and simple, repeatable habits.

some_experience.label: I've been training for a bit. 💪
some_experience.description2: This is the moment when the body gets used to training — that's why it's crucial to introduce a plan with specific structure and progression.

advanced.label: I've been exercising for a long time. 🥇
advanced.description1: Great job! You already know what regularity and consistency look like.
advanced.description2: At this stage, we will focus on optimization: precise plan, progression and recovery.

Experience.errorMsg: Please select your training experience before proceeding.

Equipment.title: What equipment do you have available at home?
Equipment.subtitle: (you can select more than one option)

none.label: I don't have access to any workout equipment. 🚫
none.description: The plan will be based on bodyweight exercises and simple household items.

bands.label: Resistance bands.
bands.description: Mini bands and power bands will allow us to add resistance and graduate exercise difficulty.

dumbbells.label: Dumbbells.
dumbbells.description: We will use one-handed and two-handed variants to fully utilize the potential of dumbbells.

barbell.label: Barbell and weights.
barbell.description: We will arrange classic lifts (squats, deadlifts, presses) adjusting volume to your goal.

bench.label: Weight bench.
bench.description: The bench will enable adding lying and incline exercises to better target the stimulus.

pullup_bar.label: Pull-up bar.
pullup_bar.description: The bar will allow for performing pull-ups and other calisthenics exercises.

dip_bar.label: Dip bars.
dip_bar.description: Bars will enable performing dips and other exercises for the triceps brachii.

Equipment.errorMsg: Select at least one equipment option to proceed.

Difficulty.title:
What is your BIGGEST
difficulty related to the gym?
Difficulty.errorMsg: Please select one of the options before proceeding.

options.motivation: I lack motivation for workouts/following a diet. 😔
options.effects: I get discouraged by the fact that I don't see results. ⏳
options.insecurity: I'm afraid to go to the gym, or I feel insecure there. 😟
options.diet: I don't quite know how to follow a diet. ❓
options.no_difficulty: I don't have any of the above difficulties. ✅

Sleep.title:
How much time
do you spend sleeping?
messages: It's hard for good recovery with such amount of sleep... Remember to work on it :)
Good amount of sleep — recovery supports training and health.
Very good amount of sleep — optimal recovery.
Too much sleep can mean irregularity — monitor your well-being.

PushupsStep.title: How many push-ups are you able to do in one go?

PullupsStep.title: How many pull-ups are you able to do in one go?

DurationStep.info: Optimal workout time is 45-60 minutes. Remember that quality of sets is more important than their quantity.

ResultPage.title:
Your Workout Plan
is ready!
ResultPage.intro1:
Created based on
Your 14 answers by
an advanced training algorithm
designed specifically for
physique building and fat reduction.
ResultPage.intro2:
You will receive an individual plan
based on data, which was created
in less than 3 minutes thanks to
technology that analyzes over
4,000 training combinations.
ResultPage.subtitle:
Quick Summary
of Your results
ResultPage.conclusion1: And then matches a specific workout plan that fits Your situation better than 99% of ready plans on the internet.
ResultPage.conclusion2: This is a combination of personal trainer knowledge and system precision, which makes no mistakes and doesn't guess.

ResultPage.sampleTitle: And here are a few pages from Rafal's plan!
